definitions.example: Regular exercise and a balanced diet contribute to overall fitness.
definitions.definition: The ability to perform daily tasks and activities with energy and vitality. It is a combination of physical fitness and mental fitness.

definitions.example: A person with high physical fitness can perform daily tasks and activities with ease.
definitions.definition: The ability to perform physical activities with energy and vitality. It includes cardiovascular endurance, muscular strength and endurance, flexibility, and body composition.

definitions.example: Weightlifting is an effective way to improve muscular strength.
definitions.definition: The maximum force a muscle can exert in a single contraction. It is an important component of physical fitness.

definitions.example: Cycling is an effective way to improve muscular endurance.
definitions.definition: The ability of a muscle to sustain activity for a prolonged period. It is an important component of physical fitness.

definitions.example: Running is an effective way to improve cardiovascular endurance.
definitions.definition: The ability of the heart and lungs to supply oxygen to the muscles during sustained activity. It is an important component of physical fitness.

definitions.example: Stretching is an effective way to improve flexibility.
definitions.definition: The range of motion in a joint, allowing for smooth and efficient movement. It is an important component of physical fitness.

definitions.example: A healthy body composition is achieved through a balanced diet and regular exercise.
definitions.definition: The proportion of fat and lean body mass in an individual. It is an important component of physical fitness.

definitions.example: Balance exercises such as standing on one leg can improve balance.
definitions.definition: The ability to maintain equilibrium and orientation in space. It is an important component of physical fitness.

definitions.example: Playing a musical instrument requires coordination between hands and fingers.
definitions.definition: The ability to integrate different movements and actions to achieve a specific goal. It is an important component of physical fitness.

definitions.example: A balanced diet provides the necessary nutrients for optimal functioning.
definitions.definition: The science of providing the body with the necessary nutrients for optimal functioning. It includes macronutrients (carbohydrates, proteins, and fats) and micronutrients (vitamins and minerals).

definitions.example: Carbohydrates provide energy for the body.
definitions.definition: The three main categories of nutrients that provide energy and support growth and maintenance. They include carbohydrates, proteins, and fats.

definitions.example: Grains, fruits, and vegetables are rich in carbohydrates.
definitions.definition: The primary source of energy for the body. They include simple carbohydrates (sugars) and complex carbohydrates (starches and fibers).

definitions.example: Lean meats, fish, and eggs are good sources of protein.
definitions.definition: The building blocks of the body, essential for growth and maintenance. They are found in animal and plant-based foods.

definitions.example: Nuts, seeds, and avocados are rich in healthy fats.
definitions.definition: An essential nutrient that provides energy and supports the absorption of vitamins. They are found in animal and plant-based foods.

definitions.example: Leafy greens are rich in iron and vitamins.
definitions.definition: The essential vitamins and minerals that support growth and maintenance. They are found in small amounts in foods.

definitions.example: Vitamin C is essential for a healthy immune system.
definitions.definition: A group of micronutrients that support growth and maintenance. They are found in foods and are essential for optimal functioning.

definitions.example: Calcium is essential for strong bones and teeth.
definitions.definition: A group of micronutrients that support growth and maintenance. They are found in foods and are essential for optimal functioning.

definitions.example: Drinking plenty of water before and during exercise is essential for hydration.
definitions.definition: The process of consuming enough water to maintain optimal bodily functions. It is essential for physical performance and overall health.

definitions.example: Coconut water is a natural source of electrolytes.
definitions.definition: The essential minerals that regulate various bodily functions, including hydration and nerve function. They include sodium, potassium, and calcium.

definitions.example: A sports dietitian can help athletes create a personalized nutrition plan.
definitions.definition: The application of nutrition principles to optimize physical performance and support athletic goals.

definitions.example: A well-designed athlete nutrition plan can improve performance and support overall health.
definitions.definition: A personalized nutrition plan that meets an athlete's specific needs and goals.
